main.c(3) Library Functions Manual main.c(3)

NAME

main.c - ascii-chat Discovery Mode Entry Point

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int discovery_main (void)
Run discovery mode main loop.

Detailed Description

ascii-chat Discovery Mode Entry Point

Discovery mode enables zero-configuration video chat where participants can dynamically become hosts based on NAT quality. This implements the "one command to start, one command to join" philosophy.

Discovery Flow

1.
Parse session string (word-word-word format)
2.
Query ACDS for session information
3.
Assess NAT quality (STUN test)
4.
Either: a. Connect to existing host as participant b. Become host if no host exists or better NAT quality
5.
Handle dynamic role changes during session

Implementation Architecture

Discovery mode uses lib/session APIs for media handling:

  • session_host_t: For rendering and broadcasting when elected host
  • session_participant_t: For capture and display when not host
  • discovery_session_t: For ACDS connection and host negotiation

No network protocol code duplication - all media handling via lib/session.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Version

1.0

Definition in file discovery/main.c.

Function Documentation

int discovery_main (void )

Run discovery mode main loop. Discovery mode entry point for unified binary.

Handles session discovery, host negotiation, and media flow.

Returns

0 on success, non-zero error code on failure

Definition at line 351 of file discovery/main.c.

351                          {
352   log_debug("discovery_main() starting");
353 
354   // Discovery-specific setup: initialize ACDS connection and session negotiation
355   // Note: Shared setup (keepawake, splash, terminal, capture, display, audio)
356   // is handled by session_client_like_run()
357 
358   // Get session string from options (command-line argument)
359   const char *session_string = GET_OPTION(session_string);
360   bool is_initiator = (session_string == NULL || session_string[0] == '\0');
361 
362   int port_int = GET_OPTION(port);
363 
364   log_debug("Discovery: is_initiator=%d, port=%d", is_initiator, port_int);
365 
366   // Validate mutually exclusive options: discovery_service_url vs discovery_port
367   const char *service_url = GET_OPTION(discovery_service_url);
368   if (service_url && service_url[0] != '\0') {
369     int discovery_port = GET_OPTION(discovery_port);
370     if (discovery_port != ACIP_DISCOVERY_DEFAULT_PORT) {
371       log_fatal("--discovery-service-url and --discovery-service-port are mutually exclusive");
372       return ERROR_USAGE;
373     }
374   }
375 
376   // Create discovery session configuration
377   discovery_config_t discovery_config = {
378       .acds_address = GET_OPTION(discovery_server),
379       .acds_port = (uint16_t)GET_OPTION(discovery_port),
380       .acds_url = service_url,
381       .session_string = is_initiator ? NULL : session_string,
382       .local_port = (uint16_t)port_int,
383       .on_state_change = on_discovery_state_change,
384       .on_session_ready = on_session_ready,
385       .on_error = on_discovery_error,
386       .callback_user_data = NULL,
387       .should_exit_callback = discovery_capture_should_exit_adapter,
388       .exit_callback_data = NULL,
389   };
390 
391   // Create discovery session (stored in global for discovery_run() to access)
392   g_discovery = discovery_session_create(&discovery_config);
393   if (!g_discovery) {
394     log_fatal("Failed to create discovery session");
395     return ERROR_MEMORY;
396   }
397 
398   // Start discovery session (connects to ACDS, creates/joins, initiates NAT negotiation)
399   log_debug("Discovery: starting discovery session");
400   asciichat_error_t result = discovery_session_start(g_discovery);
401   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
402     log_fatal("Failed to start discovery session: %d", result);
403     discovery_session_destroy(g_discovery);
404     g_discovery = NULL;
405     return result;
406   }
407 
408   // No network interrupt callback needed - discovery session handles its own shutdown
409   set_interrupt_callback(NULL);
410 
411   /* ========================================================================
412    * Configure and Run Shared Client-Like Session Framework
413    * ========================================================================
414    * session_client_like_run() handles all shared initialization:
415    * - Terminal output management
416    * - Keepawake system
417    * - Splash screen lifecycle
418    * - Media source selection
419    * - FPS probing
420    * - Audio initialization
421    * - Display context creation
422    * - Proper cleanup ordering
423    *
424    * Discovery mode provides:
425    * - discovery_run() callback: NAT negotiation, role determination, media handling
426    * - discovery_keyboard_handler: interactive controls for participant role
427    */
428 
429   session_client_like_config_t config = {
430       .run_fn = discovery_run,
431       .run_user_data = NULL,
432       .tcp_client = NULL,
433       .websocket_client = NULL,
434       .discovery = (void *)g_discovery, // Opaque pointer to discovery session
435       .custom_should_exit = NULL,
436       .exit_user_data = NULL,
437       .keyboard_handler = discovery_keyboard_handler,
438       .max_reconnect_attempts = 0, // Discovery doesn't retry - role is determined once
439       .should_reconnect_callback = NULL,
440       .reconnect_user_data = NULL,
441       .reconnect_delay_ms = 0,
442       .print_newline_on_tty_exit = false, // Server/participant manages cursor
443   };
444 
445   log_debug("Discovery: calling session_client_like_run()");
446   asciichat_error_t session_result = session_client_like_run(&config);
447   log_debug("Discovery: session_client_like_run() returned %d", session_result);
448 
449   // Cleanup discovery session
450   log_debug("Discovery: cleaning up");
451 
452   if (g_discovery) {
453     discovery_session_stop(g_discovery);
454     discovery_session_destroy(g_discovery);
455     g_discovery = NULL;
456   }
457 
458   return (session_result == ASCIICHAT_OK) ? 0 : (int)session_result;
459 }




References ACIP_DISCOVERY_DEFAULT_PORT,
    ASCIICHAT_OK, discovery_session_create(),
    discovery_session_destroy(), discovery_session_start(),
    discovery_session_stop(), ERROR_MEMORY, ERROR_USAGE,
    GET_OPTION, log_debug, log_fatal,
    session_client_like_run(), and set_interrupt_callback().
